name: newman-tests
description: Newman API tests with Allure reporting

scripts.test:e2e: newman run Collection-Multi.postman_collection.json -e e2e.postman_environment.json -r cli,allure --reporter-allure-export allure-results
scripts.test:preprod: newman run Collection-Multi.postman_collection.json -e preprod.postman_environment.json -r cli,allure --reporter-allure-export allure-results
scripts.test:test: newman run Collection-Test.postman_collection.json -e test.postman_environment.json -r cli,allure --reporter-allure-export allure-results
